title: Sour Juicy Slovakian Chicken Stew
description: A kid-friendly, low-calorie Slovakian dish featuring coconut milk and sous-vide cooking, with a perfect balance of sour and juicy flavors. This stew is a great option for a healthy and delicious dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together chicken broth, coconut milk, sour cream, lemon juice, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Seal the chicken and marinade in a sous-vide bag and cook for 2 hours.
Remove the chicken from the bag and set aside.
Strain the cooking liquid into a saucepan and bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce the cooking liquid by half, stirring occasionally, until it reaches a thick and creamy consistency.
Add the cooked chicken back into the saucepan and stir to coat with the reduced cooking liquid.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
